scripts.prestart: powershell -NoProfile -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5010,5173 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; exit 0"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others -n backend,frontend -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
